rules.summary: Unless otherwise stated, this Part applies to a BRRD undertaking which is a CRR firm , a financial holding company , a mixed financial holding company or a mixed activity holding company.
This Part does not apply in relation to:
In this Part, the following definitions shall apply:
Unless otherwise defined, any italicised expression used in this Part and in the CRR has the same meaning as in the CRR.

sections.chapter_title: Submission of Group Financial Support Agreement

rules.summary: This Chapter applies to a BRRD undertaking which is a UK parent undertaking , unless the FCA is the consolidating supervisor of its group.
The changes to this rule are effective from 23:00 on 31/12/2020.
The application referred to in 3.2 must contain the text of the proposed group financial support agreement and identify a
A BRRD undertaking must not provide financial support in accordance with a group financial support agreement unless the following conditions are met:

sections.chapter_title: Decision to Provide or Accept Group Financial Support

rules.summary: A BRRD undertaking that intends to provide financial support in accordance with a group financial support agreement must ensure that the decision to provide financial support is taken by its _mana

The decision must be reasoned and indicate the objective of the proposed financial support; in particular, the decision must indicate how the provision of the financial support complies with the condi
A firm that intends to accept financial support in accordance with a group financial support agreement must ensure that the decision to accept financial support is taken by its management body.

sections.chapter_title: Notification of Proposed Group Financial Support

rules.summary: A BRRD undertaking that intends to provide financial support in accordance with a group financial support agreement must ensure that its management body notifies:
The notification must include the reasoned decision of the management body and details of the proposed financial support including a copy of the group financial support agreement.

sections.chapter_title: Provision and Notification of Group Financial Support

rules.summary: A BRRD undertaking may only provide financial support in accordance with a group financial support agreement if:
Where the PRA has agreed to the provision of financial support subject to restrictions, a BRRD undertaking may only provide financial support in accordance with those restrictions.
Where the management body of a BRRD undertaking decides to provide the financial support, that BRRD undertaking must notify:
A BRRD undertaking must, in accordance with the general principles set out in Articles 431 - 434 of the CRR , disclose:
A BRRD undertaking must update the information disclosed at least annually.
